channel.title: Me on Cédric Walter blog
channel.description: Recent content in Me on Cédric Walter blog
channel.copyright: Reproduction without explicit permission is prohibited. All Rights Reserved. All photos remain copyright © their rightful owners. No copyright infringement is intended.

item.title: About me
item.description: Cédric Walter is a French-Swiss entrepreneur, investor, and software engineer based in Zurich, Switzerland. He spent his career developing software applications for Swiss insurance companies to handle billions of dollars in premiums.
